/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/benchmark_nw.dir/src/benchmark_nw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark_nw.dir/src/parse.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark_nw.dir/src/sw/sw_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark_nw.dir/src/sw/sw_optimised.cu.o CMakeFiles/benchmark_nw.dir/src/nw/nw_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark_nw.dir/src/nw/nw_optimised.cu.o CMakeFiles/benchmark_nw.dir/src/nw/nw_parasail.cpp.o -o benchmark_nw   -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/alex/Code/protein-align/bin/_deps/parasail-build _deps/parasail-build/libparasail.so -lm -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
